title: 这条 prompt 通过详细的描述和丰富的视觉元素，创造了一个极具冲击力和奢华感的时尚广告场景，适合用于高端男装品牌的营销活动，尤其是强调自信、力量和品质的宣传。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 通过详细的描述和丰富的视觉元素，创造了一个极具冲击力和奢华感的时尚广告场景，适合用于高端男装品牌的营销活动，尤其是强调自信、力量和品质的宣传。
prompt_original: Ultra-realistic luxury fashion campaign poster shot from a dramatic low-angle perspective across a glossy chessboard table. A stylish young male model with sharp facial features, textured curly hair, wearing thin luxury glasses and a fitted sleeveless knitted brown vest, leaning forward in a confident pose. One hand extended toward the camera holding a large white king chess piece in forced perspective, dominating the foreground. Tattooed arms visible, intense confident facial expression, direct eye contact. Elegant vintage royal interior background with dark paneled walls, warm chandelier wall lights, cinematic amber lighting, moody shadows, luxury editorial atmosphere. Chess pieces scattered on the board in foreground and background for depth. High contrast premium fashion advertising style, ultra-detailed skin texture, sharp focus on face and chess piece, shallow depth of field, glossy reflections on chessboard, dramatic commercial campaign photography, luxury menswear brand aesthetic. Bold typography at bottom saying “DRESSED TO DOMINATE”, premium poster layout, cinematic color grading, high-end fashion ad, editorial magazine quality, 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompt_zh: 超现实的奢华时尚广告海报，从一张光滑的棋盘桌的戏剧性低角度拍摄。一位具有立体五官的年轻男性模特，卷曲有质感的头发，戴着细框奢侈眼镜，穿着合身的无袖棕色针织背心，自信地前倾。一只手伸向镜头，以透视手法拿着一个大型白色国王棋子，占据前景。可见手臂上的纹身，面部表情自信而强烈，直接的眼神接触。背景为优雅复古的皇家室内装饰，深色镶板墙壁，温暖的吊灯壁灯，电影般的琥珀色灯光，忧郁的阴影，营造出奢华的编辑氛围。棋盘上散落着棋子，增加画面深度。高对比度的高端时尚广告风格，极其细致的皮肤纹理，脸部和棋子的焦点清晰，浅景深，棋盘上的光泽反射，戏剧性的商业广告摄影，奢华男装品牌的美学。底部大胆的字体写着“盛装以征服”，高级的海报布局，电影级色彩分级，高端时尚广告，杂志级别的质量，4:5的比例。
